title: Slaughterers and Meat Packers
description: Perform nonroutine or precision functions involving the preparation of large portions of meat. Work may include specialized slaughtering tasks, cutting standard or premium cuts of meat for marketing, making sausage, or wrapping meats. Work typically occurs in slaughtering, meat packing, or wholesale establishments.

tasks.text: Remove bones, and cut meat into standard cuts in preparation for marketing.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Sever jugular veins to drain blood and facilitate slaughtering.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Tend assembly lines, performing a few of the many cuts needed to process a carcass.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Shackle hind legs of animals to raise them for slaughtering or skinning.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Slit open, eviscerate, and trim carcasses of slaughtered animals.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Skin sections of animals or whole animals.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Cut, trim, skin, sort, and wash viscera of slaughtered animals to separate edible portions from offal.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Shave or singe and defeather carcasses, and wash them in preparation for further processing or packaging.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Saw, split, or scribe carcasses into smaller portions to facilitate handling.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Trim head meat, and sever or remove parts of animals' heads or skulls.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Grind meat into hamburger, and into trimmings used to prepare sausages, luncheon meats, and other meat products.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Trim, clean, or cure animal hides.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Wrap dressed carcasses or meat cuts.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
